text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Summer camp starts today. Haru Urara is...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, Trainer! I've put away my luggage and
changed clothes!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
So come on, Let's hurry up and start my training
already!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I mean, yeah! I gotta train hard!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I gotta run hard and train hard! Harder, better,
faster, stronger!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
If I do that, then I'm sure to win! So let's get down
to business!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara is the epitome of energy right now,
which means I also need to gear up and give her
some effective training!
